channel.title: Posts on Dinesh Achari
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Dinesh Achari

item.description:
I have been putting off writing for a while a long time. I started off my website with noble intentions. Wellp we are here now.

Few changes I’m considering:

  • This site is deployed in my github pages, check if I should deploy this in cloudflare pages
  • Create a workflow to post my blogs directly from obsidian

-FIN-DIN-OUT-

item.title: Total Digital Break for 48 hours
item.description:
Introduction

After being unable to focus on any task at hand, being very irritated, lethargic, and uninterested to do anything, I could feel something was wrong. In a bid to understand my situation better I truned to my trusty savior GOOGLE. Not encouraging you to do so, if you do do, google more often than not is a doodoo but again YMMW.

I was diagnosed by google and my self that I have a critical case of braing fog. Which I feel was a decent diagnosis. Onto checking what can be done about it then.
